def_before: in the period of time between two times or events|while something else is happening
gloss_after: in the time between two events

def_before: to arrange things or people in a particular way or position|to make somebody want to behave in a particular way

very serious or severe|an acute illness is one that has quickly become severe and dangerous|very sensitive and well developed|intelligent and quick to notice and understand things

to manage and organize the affairs of a company, an organization, a country, etc.|to make sure that something is done fairly and in the correct way|to give or to provide something, especially in a formal way|to give drugs, medicine, etc. to somebody

doing something for pleasure or interest, not as a job|done for pleasure, not as a job|not done or made well or with skill|a person who takes part in a sport or other activity for pleasure, not as a job|a person who does not have enough skill to be able to do something well

having the qualities that deserve somebody/something|having qualities that deserve your respect or attention|having good qualities but not very interesting or exciting|typical of what a particular person or thing might do, give, etc.
